# SAY-OS

> The app that remembers everything about your beauty routine.

SAY-OS is a voice-first salon and wellness management platform built in London, UK. It serves solo beauty professionals, salon and clinic owners, beauty educators, and individual clients.

## For Solo Professionals
Voice-first management: bookings, marketing, inventory, and client safety intelligence — all hands-free. Designed for professionals who work alone and can't stop mid-service to answer the phone.

## For Salon & Clinic Owners
Safety intelligence, client retention, talent marketplace, and GDPR Article 9 health data compliance. ICO registered (ZC121398). Manage teams with clinical-grade documentation.

## For Beauty Educators
Free institutional licence for colleges and NVQ providers. Students train on professional tools, not simulations. Graduates get 3 months of the Standard plan free via STUDENT6 code.

## For Clients — Beauty Passport
Free personal beauty profile: store formulas, allergies, skin type, and style preferences. Share with any salon anywhere in the world via QR code. Translated into 14 languages.

## Skin Type Quiz
Free Fitzpatrick skin type assessment at say-salon.com/skin-type. Determines UV sensitivity, treatment suitability, and pigmentation risk.

## Key Features
- Beauty Passport with QR sharing (14 languages)
- Safety Profile with allergy tracking and patch test records
- Skin Intelligence (Fitzpatrick typing, Barrier Load Index, Pigmentation Risk)
- Event Prep Planner (holidays, weddings — treatment timing)
- Skincare Routine Tracker with ingredient conflict detection
- Voice-first booking and client management
- Talent Marketplace (no agency fees)
